items.prompt: interprets unit-circle values and graphs bounded trigonometric functions using structural periodic reasoning
items.expected_evidence: graph and interpret bounded sine, cosine, and tangent behavior using structural features
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves unit-circle, coordinate, and periodic structure while solving or graphing.

items.prompt: explains how movement around the unit circle generates trigonometric values and periodic graph behavior
items.expected_evidence: connect periodic graph behavior to angle movement around the unit circle
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains trigonometric behavior as structured angle-coordinate-function reasoning rather than as memorized value tables.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to quadrant_sign_misread.
items.expected_evidence: identify and explain unit-circle coordinates and corresponding trigonometric values in bounded angle sets
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies where quadrant position or coordinate sign structure was ignored.

items.prompt: interprets a less-familiar trigonometric-function context and selects the representation that reveals the needed periodic or angular meaning
items.expected_evidence: solve bounded trigonometric-function questions while preserving periodic and coordinate meaning
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves coherent trigonometric-function meaning across right-triangle, unit-circle, and graph contexts.
